_note: pocket.bundle.v1 SIGNED known-answer vector (warden/bundle-kav-fix, FIX2). Proves the Phase-A demo gateway key signs a bundle whose ed25519 signature the phone verifies under the PINNED public key. Reproducible Node<->Swift: the seed derives from a PUBLIC phrase (no private key committed); Node signs, Swift (CryptoKit) verifies. Relay's Node gateway (services/pocket-gateway) MUST reproduce `canonicalBytesUtf8` byte-for-byte and sign with the real gateway key; the phone pins the real public key the same way.

demoKey.seedDerivation: seed = SHA-256(UTF-8(seedPhrase))  (32 bytes; ed25519 raw private seed)
demoKey.seedPhrase: senti-pocket phase-a demo gateway key -- NEVER PRODUCTION

tamperVectors._note: Any mutation to a signed field changes canonicalBytesUtf8, so the frozen signature no longer verifies. Semantic mutations are ALSO rejected pre-crypto by isSemanticallyValid().
examples: evidence order swapped                            (canonical changes: signature fails)

nodeRecipe: seed=sha256(seedPhrase); pkcs8=0x302e020100300506032b657004220420||seed; priv=createPrivateKey(pkcs8,der,pkcs8); pub raw = jwk.x; sig = crypto.sign(null, canonicalBytesUtf8, priv); base64url(sig) == signatureBase64url.
